shelfmark: PUL Islamic Manuscripts, Third Series no. 584e.35 (Michaelides 35)
description:
Recto: Unidentified text in Arabic script. Poetry? Phrases from letters?

Verso: In a different hand, a note in Arabic script instructing the addressee to pay the bearer the [...] and the dinars which had been mentioned. The word 'al-baghdādī' also appears. Dating: Looks earlier than most Geniza material; could be ca. 10th century or earlier. Needs examination.
